packSummary: The 1995-96 NBA season pack now removes unmatched non-roster leftovers and treats roster-only no-stat cases explicitly, giving historical ranking a cleaner real-data base.
featuredStorylines: Real 1995-96 season production now drives historical rankings
Draft The Era pulls from actual season performance instead of seed-only snapshots
The historical pack keeps authored schedule coverage while ranking from real era data

teamSpotlights.summary: Chicago remains the flagship path and the benchmark every historical run will be measured against.
Houston anchors the elite center fantasy of the era behind Hakeem Olajuwon.
Orlando gives the pack a Shaq-and-Penny superstar route with a different ceiling than Chicago.
Seattle offers a speed-and-athleticism contender path built around Payton and Kemp.
San Antonio gives you an MVP-level interior anchor through David Robinson.

modeSummaries.summary: Keep history intact and see whether you can match or beat the era-defining outcomes.
Remix the full-league 1995-96 player universe and discover what the era looks like with custom rosters.

auditNotes: Historical ranking now prefers real 1995-96 season production.
Victor Alexander remains the explicit roster-only zero-game case.
Known invalid leftovers removed from the pack are tracked as an audit count instead of staying hidden in cleanup notes.
